description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large, edge-to-edge display on the front. The front screen is mostly black with a colorful, blurred wallpaper and a prominent notch at the top housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The back is matte black with a subtle, centered Apple logo and a vertically aligned dual-camera module in the top left corner, accompanied by a flash. The sides are smooth with visible buttons for volume and power, and thin metallic accent lines at the top and bottom edges. The device appears to be constructed from a combination of glass and metal, giving it a premium and durable appearance. Its compact size and ergonomic design make it suitable for handheld use in various urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display, matte black back, and dual rear cameras. Features a prominent front notch and metallic side accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, colorful display with a top notch for sensors and camera.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the matte black back, Apple logo, and dual camera module.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the centered Apple logo and vertically aligned dual cameras in the top left.
description_view_3: Side view showing the slim profile, side buttons, and metallic accent lines.
attribute_brand_logo: Silver Apple logo centered on the back, subtle and reflective.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful, blurred wallpaper with no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: Dual camera modules vertically aligned in the top left corner on the back, accompanied by a flash.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons visible on the left edge, likely for volume control and mute; a possible power button on the right edge.
